tool_args.label: Bx41 SBS

payload.description: Bx41 Limited is replaced by Bx41 SBS

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS Corridor

payload.limits: From the Harlem River in Manhattan to The Hub in The Bronx
payload.description: SBS corridor on Webster Avenue from Harlem River to The Hub

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service

payload.description: Select Bus Service improvements on Webster Avenue for the Bx41 route

tool_args.label: Bus Bulbs at SBS Stations

payload.description: Sidewalks at SBS stations extend out to the bus lane, creating additional space for bus riders and pedestrians. Buses do not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform allow for easier boarding.

tool_args.label: Dedicated Bus and Right Turn Lanes

payload.description: Offset bus lanes allow buses to move quickly while preserving parking. Parking along the curb except at bus stops.

tool_args.label: Transit Signal Priority

payload.description: Buses will get an extended green light at certain intersections, reducing stop time at red lights

tool_args.label: Pedestrian Amenities

payload.description: Curb extensions, pedestrian safety islands, and medians will make intersections safer

tool_args.label: Fare Collection Machines

payload.description: Customers pay their fare at the SBS stop before they board, shortening the time that buses are stopped

tool_args.label: New Bus Shelters

payload.description: New bus shelters at SBS stations

payload.description: CAC Meeting and Public Open House to review final draft plan
